title: /handoff is my new favourite skill
description:
Learn how to hand off your AI coding sessions to separate agents using the /handoff skill. In this deep dive, I explain why I built this skill, how it differs from /compact, and show real-world patterns for managing multiple concurrent AI sessions.

0:00 Discovering the handoff skill
1:36 Context windows and compact explained
4:49 Why handoff differs from compact
6:14 Using handoff during grilling sessions
7:20 Handing off to prototype
9:23 Cross-agent workflow benefits
9:50 Skill design decisions
11:44 Wrap up and course info
